documents.gem_suggestion: 增加低频的力度和深度，使用宽动态范围和大堂混响效果，以增强整体氛围感和空间感。

title.zh: 省略... - 惊叹! - 声音延长

prompt.zh: 省略... - 惊叹! - 声音延长 - （括号）

documents.original_prompt: - Elipsis... this tends to make the system approach it more slowly, particularly if it's used... multiple times... in the line... - Exclamation! this doensn't often have a huge impact but it can tell the system to emphasize a line - Oooooohhh whoaaa ahhhh! vocalizations generally work extremely well to amp up a chorus (the system will not render non-word vocalizations without explicitly being told) - mmmmmmmmmmm oh... gentler vocalizations will have a similar dampening effect - (parenthesis lyrics) this does really well, and seems to do really good at making it do call-and-response or antiphonal
documents.translated_prompt: Elipsis... this tends to make the system approach it more slowly, particularly if it's used... multiple times... in the line... - Exclamation! this doensn't often have a huge impact but it can tell the system to emphasize a line - Oooooohhh whoaaa ahhhh! vocalizations generally work extremely well to amp up a chorus (the system will not render non-word vocalizations without explicitly being told) - mmmmmmmmmmm oh... gentler vocalizations will have a similar dampening effect - (parenthesis lyrics) this does really well, and seems to do really good at making it do call-and-response or antiphonal

prompt.en: - Elipsis... this tends to make the system approach it more slowly, particularly if it's used... multiple times... in the line... - Exclamation! this doensn't often have a huge impact but it can tell the system to emphasize a line - Oooooohhh whoaaa ahhhh! vocalizations generally work extremely well to amp up a chorus (the system will not render non-word vocalizations without explicitly being told) - mmmmmmmmmmm oh... gentler vocalizations will have a similar dampening effect - (parenthesis lyrics) this does really well, and seems to do really good at making it do call-and-response or antiphonal
prompt.zh: Elipsis... this tends to make the system approach it more slowly, particularly if it's used... multiple times... in the line... - Exclamation! this doensn't often have a huge impact but it can tell the system to emphasize a line - Oooooohhh whoaaa ahhhh! vocalizations generally work extremely well to amp up a chorus (the system will not render non-word vocalizations without explicitly being told) - mmmmmmmmmmm oh... gentler vocalizations will have a similar dampening effect - (parenthesis lyrics) this does really well, and seems to do really good at making it do call-and-response or antiphonal

documents.gem_suggestion: Consider using more explicit vocalization tags for non-word sounds to enhance the chorus. Parenthesis lyrics can be used effectively for call-and-response patterns.

prompt.zh: 省略... - 感叹! - 声音延长 - （括号）

documents.original_prompt: - Elipsis... this tends to make the system approach it more slowly, particularly if it's used... multiple times... in the line... - Exclamation! this doensn't often have a huge impact but it can tell the system to emphasize a line - Oooooohhh whoaaa ahhhh! vocalizations generally work extremely well to amp up a chorus (the system will not render non-word vocalizations without explicitly being told) - mmmmmmmmmmm oh... gentler vocalizations will have a similar dampening effect - (parenthesis lyrics) this does really well, and seems to do really good at making it do call-and-response or antiphonal
documents.translated_prompt: Elipsis... 这往往会使得系统更缓慢地处理，特别是如果它在行中...多次使用... - Exclamation! 这通常不会有太大影响，但可以告诉系统强调某一行 - Oooooohhh whoaaa ahhhh! 嗓音通常非常有助于提升副歌（系统不会在没有明确指示的情况下渲染非词语的嗓音） - mmmmmmmmmmm oh... 更柔和的嗓音会有类似减弱的效果 - (括号中的歌词) 这做得非常好，似乎特别擅长做呼应或对唱

title.en: - Elipsis... this tends to make the system approac
title.zh: Elipsis... this tends to make the system approac

prompt.en: - Elipsis... this tends to make the system approach it more slowly, particularly if it's used... multiple times... in the line... - Exclamation! this doensn't often have a huge impact but it can tell the system to emphasize a line - Oooooohhh whoaaa ahhhh! vocalizations generally work extremely well to amp up a chorus (the system will not render non-word vocalizations without explicitly being told) - mmmmmmmmmmm oh... gentler vocalizations will have a similar dampening effect - (parenthesis lyrics) this does really well, and seems to do really good at making it do call-and-response or antiphonal
prompt.zh: Elipsis... 这往往会使得系统更缓慢地处理，特别是如果它在行中...多次使用... - Exclamation! 这通常不会有太大影响，但可以告诉系统强调某一行 - Oooooohhh whoaaa ahhhh! 嗓音通常非常有助于提升副歌（系统不会在没有明确指示的情况下渲染非词语的嗓音） - mmmmmmmmmmm oh... 更柔和的嗓音会有类似减弱的效果 - (括号中的歌词) 这做得非常好，似乎特别擅长做呼应或对唱

documents.gem_suggestion: 使用更多的非词语嗓音和括号中的歌词来增强副歌和呼应效果

documents.original_prompt: Taking it to the next level If you really want to dive deep and save yourself the weeks of frustration I went through, I have put all my research into a single place. I created a massive PDF bundle that includes my full database of 3,500+ prompts and style tags. It is essentially the "cheat sheet" I wish I had when I started.
documents.translated_prompt: 如果你真的想深入研究并避免我经历过的几周挫折，我已经将所有研究汇总到一个地方。我创建了一个包含3,500多个提示和风格标签的大型PDF合集。这基本上是我刚开始时希望拥有的“速查表”。

I created a massive PDF bundle that includes my full database of 3,500+ prompts and style tags. It is essentially the "cheat sheet" I wish I had when I started.
